# Lost Gift Cards

If you lose your Acme Shop gift card, you can request a replacement under certain conditions. To initiate the process, you must provide proof of purchase, such as a receipt or confirmation email, along with the payment method used. If the card was registered on the website, verification will be easier. Contact customer support for assistance; there may be a $5 processing fee, and replacement is not guaranteed in cases of promotional offers or partial usage. For secure handling, it's advisable to register your gift card online right after purchase.

[Source: gift_cards.md#lost-gift-cards]
